name: codeflow-shell
description: CodeFlow Shell — minimal executable wrapper around @codeflow/runtime. v0.3.0-alpha (P4 sprint release): 4 banner rows now report per-subsystem fcop wire-up state — `fcop bridge`, `Task parser`, `Review writer`, `Inbox watcher`. fcop bridge is opt-in via `PYTHON_BIN` env (or `CODEFLOW_SKIP_FCOP_PROBE=1` to keep Day-1 behavior). Charter 5.4 alignment: workspace migrated docs/agents → fcop/ (OPS-015), schema ownership matrix clarified (Day 5). See `docs/releases/v0.3.0-alpha.md` for the full changelog.
